steps: Sign in to MyASU with ASURITE.
Open Parking Portal > Citations.
Click 'Appeal' on the citation in question (must be within 10 calendar days).
Upload supporting evidence (photos, signage, receipts).
Submit. You'll receive an emailed decision within 14 business days.
topics.notes: Habitual appeals (3+ in a year) may be denied without review.

steps: Go to asu.edu/password.
Click 'Reset password' and enter your ASURITE.
Verify with your registered MFA method (Duo Push, SMS, or backup code).
Choose a new password meeting policy (16+ chars, no last 24 reused).
Sign back in to MyASU to confirm.
topics.office_hours: 24/7 self-service; live help via UTO Service Desk 855-278-5080
topics.notes: If MFA is also lost, use the in-person identity verification at the Tech Studio.

topics.topic: Book a study room at Hayden Library
steps: Visit lib.asu.edu and click 'Book a Room'.
Filter by location (Hayden), capacity, and date.
Sign in with ASURITE.
Select up to a 2-hour slot, max 14 days in advance.
Confirm — you'll get a confirmation email and a check-in code.
topics.notes: No-shows after 15 minutes free the room automatically. 3 no-shows in a semester = booking suspended for 30 days.

topics.topic: Submit an HR question (benefits, payroll, leave)
steps: Open the ServiceNow HR Portal at hrportal.asu.edu.
Choose the category that fits (Benefits, Payroll, Leave, Other).
Submit the form — you'll receive a ticket number.
Watch your ASU email for a response from your assigned HR Partner.
topics.notes: Urgent payroll issues should be flagged via the 'Urgent' checkbox on the form.

steps: Open ServiceNow > Classroom Support.
Provide building, room, scheduled time, and the issue.
If urgent (in-progress class), call 480-965-6500 instead.
A technician will arrive within 15 minutes for in-progress issues.
topics.sla: 15-minute on-site for in-progress; 1 business day for scheduled
topics.notes: Always provide the room number on the door — not the catalog name.
